languages.text: "Не нужен". {n}Себериан с горечью качает головой, в его взгляде вы читаете что-то похожее на теплоту.{/n} "Но я благодарен за ваши слова. Не думайте, что я не заметил, как изменился Простор Коронус. Не осталось ничего, что я знал и чем дорожил".

"No, it does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head sadly, yet you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for your words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued has been lost."
languages.original_text: "Не нужен". {n}Себериан с горечью качает головой, в его взгляде вы читаете что-то похожее на теплоту.{/n} "Но я благодарен за ваши слова. Не думайте, что я не заметил, как изменился Простор Коронус. Не осталось ничего, что я знал и чем дорожил".

traits.locale_text: "It does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head glumly, and you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for those words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued is gone from it."

"It does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head glumly, and you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for those words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued is gone from it."

"No, it does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head sadly, yet you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for your words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued has been lost."

"No, it does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head sadly, yet you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for your words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued has been lost."

languages.text: "Nein." {n}Seberian schüttelt traurig den Kopf, aber du erkennst eine gewisse Wärme in seinen Augen.{/n} "Aber ich danke Euch für Eure Worte. Denkt nicht, mir wäre entgangen, wie sehr sich die Koronus-Ausdehnung verändert hat. Alles, was ich kannte und schätzte, war einmal."
languages.original_text: "No, it does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head sadly, yet you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for your words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued has been lost."

traits.locale_text: "Nein." {n}Seberian schüttelt traurig den Kopf, aber du erkennst eine gewisse Wärme in seinen Augen.{/n} "Aber ich danke Euch für Eure Worte. Denkt nicht, mir wäre entgangen, wie sehr sich die Koronus-Ausdehnung verändert hat. Alles, was ich kannte und schätzte, war einmal."

languages.text: « Non. » {n}Seberian secoue tristement la tête, mais vous remarquez une forme de chaleur dans son regard.{/n} « Je vous remercie cependant pour ces paroles. N'allez pas croire que je n'ai pas remarqué à quel point les Étendues de Koronus ont changé. Tout ce que je connaissais et qui était cher à mon cœur a disparu. »
languages.original_text: "No, it does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head sadly, yet you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for your words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued has been lost."

traits.locale_text: « Non. » {n}Seberian secoue tristement la tête, mais vous remarquez une forme de chaleur dans son regard.{/n} « Je vous remercie cependant pour ces paroles. N'allez pas croire que je n'ai pas remarqué à quel point les Étendues de Koronus ont changé. Tout ce que je connaissais et qui était cher à mon cœur a disparu. »

languages.text: «No, en absoluto». {n}Seberian niega con la cabeza con cierta tristeza, pero identificas algo de calidez en sus ojos.{/n} «Pero le agradezco sus palabras. No crea que no he visto cuánto ha cambiado la Extensión de Koronus. Todo lo que conocía y valoraba ha desaparecido».
languages.original_text: "No, it does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head sadly, yet you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for your words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued has been lost."

traits.locale_text: «No, en absoluto». {n}Seberian niega con la cabeza con cierta tristeza, pero identificas algo de calidez en sus ojos.{/n} «Pero le agradezco sus palabras. No crea que no he visto cuánto ha cambiado la Extensión de Koronus. Todo lo que conocía y valoraba ha desaparecido».

languages.text: "Hayır, yok." {n}Seberian, başını üzüntüyle iki yana sallıyor. Gözlerinde sıcaklığa benzer bir şey seziyorsun.{/n} "Ancak sözlerin için minnettarım. Koronus Enginliği'nin nasıl değiştiğinin gözümden kaçtığını düşünme. Bildiğim, değer verdiğim her şey yitmiş."
languages.original_text: "No, it does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head sadly, yet you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for your words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued has been lost."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır, yok." {n}Seberian, başını üzüntüyle iki yana sallıyor. Gözlerinde sıcaklığa benzer bir şey seziyorsun.{/n} "Ancak sözlerin için minnettarım. Koronus Enginliği'nin nasıl değiştiğinin gözümden kaçtığını düşünme. Bildiğim, değer verdiğim her şey yitmiş."

languages.text: “不，它不需要。”{n}塞贝里安悲伤地摇了摇头，但你从他的眼中读出了某种近乎温暖的东西。{/n}“不过谢谢你能这么说。别以为我没注意到科罗努斯扩区的变化。我所熟知和珍视的一切，都已不复存在。”
languages.original_text: "No, it does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head sadly, yet you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for your words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued has been lost."

traits.locale_text: “不，它不需要。”{n}塞贝里安悲伤地摇了摇头，但你从他的眼中读出了某种近乎温暖的东西。{/n}“不过谢谢你能这么说。别以为我没注意到科罗努斯扩区的变化。我所熟知和珍视的一切，都已不复存在。”

languages.text: 「いいえ、そうではありません。 」{n}セベリアンは悲しそうに首を振るが、彼の目は温かさを帯びているように見えた。{/n} 「しかし、あなたの言葉に感謝します。 コロヌス・エクスパンションがどのように変化したか、私は気づいていません。 私が知っていたこと、大切にしていたものがすべて失われました。」
languages.original_text: "No, it does not." {n}Seberian shakes his head sadly, yet you read something that looks like warmth in his eyes.{/n} "But I am grateful for your words. Do not think it has escaped my notice how the Koronus Expanse has changed. All that I knew and valued has been lost."

traits.locale_text: 「いいえ、そうではありません。 」{n}セベリアンは悲しそうに首を振るが、彼の目は温かさを帯びているように見えた。{/n} 「しかし、あなたの言葉に感謝します。 コロヌス・エクスパンションがどのように変化したか、私は気づいていません。 私が知っていたこと、大切にしていたものがすべて失われました。」
